title: Upgradeable Spawner
body:
# Upgradeable Spawner v1.5

**Drop item on spawner to upgrade it.**  
**Look at a spawner and `/trigger getSpawnerData` to get spawner data.**
**`/trigger u_spawner.config` to config this datapack (Required cheat)**

\<SpawnerData> \<Vanilla> \<Item>(+|-) => (Max|Min)

- MaxSpawnDelay 800 sugar-2 => 0
- MinSpawnDelay 200 blaze_powder-2 => 0
- SpawnCount 4 glowstone_dust+1 => 64
- RequiredPlayerRange 16 redstone+1 => 256
- MaxNearbyEntities 6 lapis_lazuli+1 => 96
- SpawnRange 4 chorus_fruit+1=> 64
Mobs won't collision when spawning.
